summary.name: PBMC3K preprocessing pass
summary.description: Loaded counts, ran sc.pp.* QC and normalisation.
summary.body: Walked through the standard scanpy preprocessing pipeline on PBMC3K, settling on percentile-based mt-cutoffs and log1p-norm.

observations.name: percentile mt-cutoff
observations.body: Used sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics + 99th percentile cutoff over fixed thresholds because cell composition varies across batches.

observations.name: Seurat naming conventions
observations.body: User wants downstream column names to match Seurat's convention so notebooks port between tools.
